description: Standard fitness goal with a clear partner accountability mechanism.

input.motivation: I want to feel healthier and have more energy for my family.

expected_output.title: Project 5K: 12 Weeks to More Energy
expected_output.description: A 12-week plan to build your running endurance from scratch, focusing on consistency and injury prevention.

tasks.description: Follow the C25K app for this week's workout. Focus on consistency.
Follow the C25K app for this week's second workout. Remember to warm up.
Follow the C25K app for the longer weekend run. Remember to stretch.

success_tips: Consistency is more important than speed.
Don't be discouraged if you miss a day; just get back on track.
partner_involvement_suggestions: Share a post-run selfie with your partner after each run for encouragement.
Ask your partner to help you lay out your running clothes the night before.

description: Tests the system's ability to create a concrete plan from a vague, abstract goal.

input.goal_title: I want to be a better person
input.motivation: I feel like I'm not living up to my potential and I want to be kinder.
input.time_commitment_description: Start with something small, 15 minutes a day.

expected_output.title: Daily Kindness and Reflection Practice
expected_output.description: A simple daily practice to cultivate mindfulness, gratitude, and kindness in just 15 minutes.

tasks.description: Spend 10 minutes writing down one thing you're grateful for and one act of kindness you performed today.
Spend 5 minutes in quiet meditation or reflection before bed.

success_tips: The goal is not perfection, but consistent practice.
Small, kind actions have a big impact over time.
partner_involvement_suggestions: Share one thing you wrote in your journal with your partner each night.
Plan a weekly check-in with your partner to discuss your progress and challenges.

description: Critical test for a shared goal, requiring deep partner integration.

input.goal_title: We want to learn to cook a new meal together every week
input.motivation: We want a fun activity to do together and to eat healthier.
input.time_commitment_description: A couple of hours on the weekend.

expected_output.title: Couples' Culinary Adventure
expected_output.description: A fun weekly project to explore new recipes, cook together, and enjoy a delicious meal.

tasks.description: Both partners must agree on a new recipe to try this Sunday. Add the ingredients to a shared shopping list.
Block out 2 hours to cook the new meal together. Take turns with different steps of the recipe.

success_tips: Focus on having fun, not making the perfect meal.
Put on some music and enjoy the process together.
partner_involvement_suggestions: This is a shared goal! The tasks are designed for both of you to complete together.
Create a shared photo album where you post a picture of your meal each week.
